creator: allanjude@FreeBSD.org
text:
http://oss-security.openwall.org/wiki/vendors#freebsd links to:
http://security.freebsd.org/#how

which actually redirects to:
http://www.freebsd.org/security/#how

Which doesn't explain how to report a vulnerability (although there is a link kind of burried in there)

URL probably should be: https://www.freebsd.org/security/reporting.html
